scope: Final source-level QA for Unit 1 after lesson page, all practice modes, progress dashboard, local SRS, and content validation.

conditions: Fix or isolate known TypeScript blockers before relying on tsc as a regression gate.
Resolve or formally document the Vite html-inline-proxy path-space issue.
Decide whether SRS should remain flashcard-first or expand to all practice modes.
Consolidate duplicate localStorage wrappers into the shared progress helper before scaling.
Run content validation for every new Unit 2 content set.

inspectedFiles.notes: Renders Unit 1 lesson, progress dashboard, smart review card, and practice CTAs.
Dispatches all requested Unit 1 practice modes, but still performs legacy API calls for general practice state.
Supports normal flashcard mode and due-only review via review=due.
Quiz mode works and marks SRS, but due-only quiz route is not present in the inspected source snapshot.
Listening mode component exists and is routed.
Reflex mode component exists and is routed.
Typing mode component exists and is routed.
Match mode component exists and is routed.
Speed mode component exists and is routed.
Provides Unit 1 local lesson content and generated flashcards.
Provides progress and SRS helpers. Some SRS mappings are not complete for all mode item sources.
Provides reusable content validation and summary helpers.

flashcard.notes: Normal deck and due deck supported.

quiz.notes: Tracks quiz progress and SRS; due-only quiz session not present in current source snapshot.

listen.notes: Listening practice route exists and writes progress.

reflex.notes: Reflex practice route exists and writes progress.

type.notes: Typing route exists and writes progress.

match.notes: Match route exists and writes progress.

speed.notes: Speed route exists and writes progress.

notes: Progress is local to the browser/device.
mergeLessonProgress preserves existing mode fields while applying patches.
Some components still duplicate safe localStorage wrappers.

gaps: Due-only quiz route is not present in the current inspected source snapshot.
Typing and speed SRS review-item mapping are not complete.
Not every mode visibly feeds smart review in an equivalent way.

contentValidationStatus.risk: Helper is not yet wired into an automated test or CI command.

uiMobileRisks.risk: PracticePage performs legacy API calls even for local Unit 1 routes.
LessonPage CTA discoverability is uneven for type, match, and speed modes.
Long bilingual content can create tall cards on small screens.
Text-to-speech depends on browser speechSynthesis support.
Progress is localStorage-only and does not sync across devices.

build.classification: Known pre-existing path-space/build-pipeline issue; not fixed by scope.

top10IssuesBeforeUnit2: Fix unrelated TypeScript errors in CategoriesPage.tsx, FoldersPage.tsx, and StudyPage.tsx.
Resolve or formally work around the Vite html-inline-proxy path-space build failure.
Gate legacy API calls in PracticePage.tsx for local Unit lesson routes.
Consolidate duplicated localStorage wrappers into lesson-progress.ts.
Wire validateLessonContent into automated tests or CI.
Add due-only quiz review if SRS should cover quiz items fully.
Complete SRS mapping for typing, match, speed, listening, and reflex.
Improve LessonPage CTA coverage for all Unit 1 modes.
Run a dedicated mobile QA pass for long text and match interactions.
Define production policy for local-only progress versus synced user progress.
finalVerdict: Unit 1 passes source-level QA for route/mode/content/progress/SRS readiness, but project-level green build and green TypeScript cannot be claimed until known unrelated TypeScript and Vite path-space issues are resolved.
